title: Policy, Planning and International Affairs Directorate - Canada.ca
content:
## Policy, Planning and International Affairs Directorate
Health Canada's Policy, Planning and International Affairs directorate leads the strategic input on horizontal and regulatory policies and international engagement for the Health Products and Food Branch.
- Offices and divisions
- For more information
The Policy, Planning and International Affairs Directorate provides strategic advice about the Health Products and Food Branch's strategies, priorities, programs, and international engagements. We provide leadership on a wide range of health and safety issues related to health products and food. Our directorate also supports the development and advancement of the Branch's regulatory agenda and oversight for all legislative and regulatory proposals under the Food and Drugs Act and related regulatory frameworks.

## Offices and divisions
The directorate includes the:
- Strategic Horizontal Policy Division
- Office of Legislative and Regulatory Modernization

### Strategic Horizontal Policy Division
The Strategic Horizontal Policy Division provides leadership for policy development and advice on branch, departmental, Ministerial, and Cabinet priorities. It also supports Branch strategic planning and works with domestic and international stakeholders to advance Branch priorities.
In addition, the division leads regulatory and policy development to prevent or mitigate environmental risks that may be posed by drugs and also coordinates branch deliverables under the Chemicals Management Plan.

### Office of Legislative and Regulatory Modernization
The Office of Legislative and Regulatory Modernization is responsible for the development of all regulatory and legislative proposals for the Health Products and Food Branch. Evolving our regulatory tools is a key priority for health products and food to make sure we have the regulatory system needed to best protect the health and safety of Canadians. The Office works to transform our regulatory frameworks into efficient, transparent, and comprehensively aligned regulatory systems.

- Chemicals Management Plan
- Health Products and Food Branch
- Food and Drugs Act Environmental Regulatory Initiative
- Strategic Plans, Reports & Publications
